blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,623 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
